yelpAds.lastUpdated: Tue Jun 23 7 AM run -- LIVE Chrome scrape of Yelp Ads dashboard (browser connected). 30d metrics + billing period read live.
yelpAds.note: Tue Jun 23 LIVE Chrome scrape of Yelp Ads dashboard. 30d: 43.4k ad impr (82% of 53.2k), 520 ad clicks, 613 ad page visits (63% of 969), 123 ad leads (71% of 173). Billing period Jun 1-22: ad spend $416.69, Avg CPC $1.15, Avg CPL $4.58. 12mo leads: Ads 986 (57%)/Organic 742 (43%)/Total 1,728 (forecast 51); 12mo page visits 8.4k.
